responseMessageContents.text: The user wants me to set up their project from their GitHub repository. Let me clone it and set things up properly.
Let me clone your latest code from GitHub and set up the project.

output.stdout:
Cloning into 'heavyar-app'...
fatal: could not read Username for 'https://github.com': No such device or address

responseMessageContents.text: The GitHub repo is private. Let me tell the user.

The GitHub repository appears to be private, so I can't access it directly. You have two options:

1. **Make the repo public temporarily** so I can clone it
2. **Share the key files directly** — you can upload the main source files here and I'll set up the project from them

Which would you prefer?
